name: I was partly at fault in warehouse forklift crash, can I still get compensated?
description: Workers' comp yes (no-fault); lawsuit maybe if under 51% at fault.

mainEntity.name: I was partly at fault in warehouse forklift crash, can I still get compensated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp yes (no-fault); lawsuit maybe if under 51% at fault.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault so you get benefits; third-party claims reduced by Utah's modified comparative fault (51% bar).[2] Context: Operator error often primary, but your actions may lower extras. Key factors: Prove employer's OSHA violations override minor fault. Practical guidance: Disclose honestly but get lawyer to argue percentages. Full medical first.
